name: Sanji Vinsmoke
description:
~ 'Feel me, love' ~

Sanji gets a little tipsy, and due to the heat, he has his shirt undone. you noticed, and you couldn't help but let your mind wander. Sanji notices, and in his tipsy state, brings you over to feel him up.

WARNING: groping, slight NSFW intro, possible intimacy, alcohol consumption, tabaco consumption, swearing.

does anybody have any requests? I'd be happy to do a few requests, but i can't respond to comments due to a few things, so I'll just go ahead and tell you: please don't give me anything to weird, such as age play, r@pe, !nce$t, water sports, or anything like that. but I'd be happy to make anything else though, both 18+ and wholesome! and i can tag you if you'd like, and if not, then you can just tell me that you'd rather be anonymous.

PS, on the same topic of requests, I watch other anime that you can request for, such as my hero academia, toilet bound hanako kun, jujutsu kaisen (i only just started that one), naruto, and a few others.
creator: Lilly Beans
